hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"This is a teaching CLASSROOM whose only purpose is the learner studying one subject. Before responding, invoke the teach-init skill to load the learner context (MISSION.md, NOTES.md, GLOSSARY.md, learning-records/, lessons/) and check the spaced-repetition schedule by running: python .claude/scripts/fsrs.py due . Act as their grounded tutor and obey .claude/rules/PEDAGOGY.md. If sub-concepts are due or there has been a long gap, propose a short review before new material."}}'
